title: Telescope-Array Guide-Beacon Fan-Out: Phase-Mask Design for Efficient, Uniform Spot Arrays
strategies: in-phase superposition of single-spot gratings, keep only the argument (phase-only projection) -- the reference baseline
random-phase superposition: de-correlate interference by giving each grating an independent random phase offset, keep the best of several draws
weighted Gerchberg-Saxton / iterative Fourier-transform algorithm with adaptive spot reweighting to flatten uniformity and pack efficiency
multi-restart IFTA keeping the best figure of merit over several random initial phases
